target.title: fix(anthropic): accept Claude CLI apiKeyHelper auth
target.body:
Fixes #97489

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where Anthropic turns routed through the Claude CLI backend could fail OpenClaw's pre-spawn auth gate with `missing-provider-auth` when Claude Code was authenticated by `~/.claude/settings.json` `apiKeyHelper` instead of macOS Keychain or `~/.claude/.credentials.json`.

## Why This Change Was Made

Claude Code treats a configured `apiKeyHelper` as a supported credential source for dynamic/proxy auth. OpenClaw now recognizes a non-empty helper setting as Claude CLI-managed auth evidence without executing the helper or persisting helper output.

The follow-up commit also addresses the review finding that helper auth must win over stale stored Claude OAuth/token credentials. `readClaudeCliCredentials` now checks helper presence before macOS Keychain or `.credentials.json`, so OpenClaw's auth status and synthetic auth path match Claude Code credential precedence.

## User Impact

Users with proxy, vault, or rotating-key Claude CLI setups can start OpenClaw turns through `agentRuntime.id: "claude-cli"` without creating a dummy `.credentials.json` file just to satisfy OpenClaw's auth check. Status and doctor surfaces identify helper-backed auth without presenting it as OAuth-only state.

## Evidence

- Source contract checked: Claude Code docs list `apiKeyHelper` as a custom credential script and include it before `CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN` and subscription OAuth credentials in authentication precedence: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/iam#credential-management
- Added mixed credential regression: `src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts` covers `apiKeyHelper` plus stale `.credentials.json` plus an available Keychain mock and asserts helper wins without executing Keychain lookup.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts` -> `Test Files 1 passed (1)`, `Tests 18 passed (18)`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts src/agents/auth-profiles.external-cli-sync.test.ts` -> `Test Files 1 passed (1)`, `Tests 22 passed (22)`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-providers.config.ts extensions/anthropic/index.test.ts` -> `Test Files 1 passed (1)`, `Tests 33 passed (33)`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts src/agents/model-auth.profiles.test.ts -t "accepts Claude CLI apiKeyHelper auth without a stored credential profile"` -> `Test Files 1 passed (1)`, `Tests 1 passed | 70 skipped (71)`.
- `git diff --check`.

Local proof limits:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts src/agents/cli-credentials.test.ts src/agents/model-auth.profiles.test.ts src/agents/model-auth-label.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles.external-cli-sync.test.ts src/agents/cli-auth-epoch.test.ts src/agents/model-auth-markers.test.ts` completed with 146/150 passing; the remaining 4 failures were Windows `EBUSY: resource busy or locked, unlink ... openclaw.sqlite[-wal|-shm]` cleanup errors in `src/agents/model-auth.profiles.test.ts`, not assertion failures in the changed credential precedence path.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.commands.config.ts src/commands/doctor-claude-cli.test.ts` completed with 6/7 passing; the remaining failure is the existing Windows POSIX-path expectation in `resolveClaudeCliProjectDirForWorkspace`.
- Testbox-through-Crabbox was attempted with `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox ...`, but this local environment's `crabbox` binary failed wrapper sanity checks before creating a Testbox lease, so no remote id was available.
Additional real setup proof after ClawSweeper review (2026-06-30):

- Isolated setup command used a temporary `HOME`, `USERPROFILE`, `OPENCLAW_HOME`, and `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR`; wrote only `~/.claude/settings.json` with `apiKeyHelper`; confirmed `~/.claude/.credentials.json` was absent and Anthropic auth env vars were cleared.
- `node --import tsx --input-type=module` invoked the real shared Claude CLI credential reader plus the Anthropic provider discovery synthetic-auth seam.
- Output: `CLAUDE_HELPER_REAL_SETUP_PROOF {"head":"326b76c24944994e24a4d453bfd85dd7420835f8","settingsJson":true,"credentialsJson":false,"envAnthropicApiKey":false,"sharedCredential":{"type":"api_key_helper","provider":"anthropic"},"syntheticAuth":{"apiKey":"openclaw:claude-cli-api-key-helper","source":"Claude CLI apiKeyHelper","mode":"api-key"},"missingProviderAuthAvoided":true}`.
target.author: lzy3538
